# WealthMaster India

> Independent financial services and wealth advisory platform focused on Mutual Funds, SIPs, Retirement Planning, Insurance, PMS, AIF, NCDs and long-term wealth creation for Indian investors.

WealthMaster India is led by Amit Chadha (Founder & Investment Advisor) and provides personalized SIP planning, goal-based portfolio construction, insurance review and alternate investments (PMS, AIF, NCDs) for retail investors and HNIs.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Build long-term wealth with confidence — overview of services.
- [About](/about): Mission, principles, and team behind WealthMaster India.
- [Explore Funds](/funds): Curated mutual funds across equity, debt, hybrid and ELSS categories.
- [SIP Calculator](/calculator): Estimate the future value of monthly SIP investments.
- [Get Started](/get-started): Request a personalized advisory consultation.
- [Book Consultation](/book-consultation): Schedule an investment consultation with Amit Chadha.
- [Contact](/contact): Call, email, WhatsApp or visit the New Delhi office.

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Investor login.
- [Sign Up](/signup): Create an investor account.
